name: Snow White Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Chicken breast, sliced into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a frying pan and sauté the chicken for a few minutes until cooked through. Remove the chicken and set aside.
2. Sauté the fresh mushrooms, snow peas, ginger, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots for a few minutes until they are tender.
3. Add cornstarch to the pan and cook for a few more minutes to thicken the sauce.
4. Return the cooked chicken to the pan and stir until heated through.
